prompt: "Draw a histogram of the last column of the DataFrame and return the plot. The function should raise the exception for: ValueError: If the input is not a DataFrame, or if the DataFrame is empty. The function should output with: tuple(hist_axes: matplotlib.axes.Axes) hist_axes: A Matplotlib Axes object representing the histogram of the last column. The histogram includes: Title: 'Histogram of ' followed by the name of the last column. X-axis label: 'Value' Y-axis label: 'Frequency' You should write self-contained code starting with: ``` import pandas as pd import matplotlib.pyplot as plt def task_func(df, bins=20): ```"
